entities.name: Dry Run by Default
entities.context: Safety feature that previews changes before execution

entities.name: Trash Don't Delete
entities.context: Safety principle of moving files to Trash/ rather than permanent deletion

entities.name: Protected Files
entities.context: Safety feature that prevents modification of hidden/system files

entities.name: Detailed Reporting
entities.context: Safety feature providing clear preview of all planned actions

entities.name: Reversibility
entities.context: Safety principle enabling file recovery from Trash

relationships.context: Reversibility is enabled by the trash-based deletion approach
Files can be recovered from Trash location
Moves files to Trash/ for recovery
Both features provide visibility before changes occur
